seoTitle: Trafalgar vs Trayning — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Trafalgar and Trayning. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Trafalgar and Trayning.
heading: Trafalgar vs Trayning — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Trafalgar, Western Australia and Trayning, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Trafalgar has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Trayning (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Trafalgar or Trayning safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Trafalgar has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Trayning scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Trafalgar scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Trayning scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Trafalgar or Trayning?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Trafalgar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
